name: pages
description: KeePass Web — the browser app itself, built into self-contained HTML distributables.

scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/bundle-iife/src/index.ts 0x67/bundle-iife.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/bundle-iife/src/index.ts router/bundle-iife.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/bundle-iife/src/index.ts cloud-google-drive/bundle-iife.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/inliner/src/index.ts 0x67/build.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/inliner/src/index.ts router/build.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/inliner/src/index.ts index/build.json && node --experimental-strip-types ../tools/build/inliner/src/index.ts cloud-google-drive/build.json
